'''ân-z-p''' ('''kanazap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vat|vat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vat|vat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-z-p
|-
! Lemma
| kanazap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinazap|thinazap]] || [[word:jinazap|jinazap]] || [[word:shinazap|shinazap]] || [[word:kinazap|kinazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunazap|thuthunazap]] || [[word:jujunazap|jujunazap]] || [[word:shushunazap|shushunazap]] || [[word:kukunazap|kukunazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunazap|thunazap]] || [[word:junazap|junazap]] || [[word:shunazap|shunazap]] || [[word:kunazap|kunazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunazap|thunazap]] || [[word:junazap|junazap]] || [[word:shunazap|shunazap]] || [[word:kunazap|kunazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenazap|thenazap]] || [[word:jenazap|jenazap]] || [[word:shenazap|shenazap]] || [[word:kenazap|kenazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonazap|thothonazap]] || [[word:jojonazap|jojonazap]] || [[word:shoshonazap|shoshonazap]] || [[word:kokonazap|kokonazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonazap|thonazap]] || [[word:jonazap|jonazap]] || [[word:shonazap|shonazap]] || [[word:konazap|konazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonazap|thonazap]] || [[word:jonazap|jonazap]] || [[word:shonazap|shonazap]] || [[word:konazap|konazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnazap|thĂŠnazap]] || [[word:jĂŠnazap|jĂŠnazap]] || [[word:shĂŠnazap|shĂŠnazap]] || [[word:kĂŠnazap|kĂŠnazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanazap|thathanazap]] || [[word:jajanazap|jajanazap]] || [[word:shashanazap|shashanazap]] || [[word:kakanazap|kakanazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanazap|thanazap]] || [[word:janazap|janazap]] || [[word:shanazap|shanazap]] || [[word:kanazap|kanazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanazap|thanazap]] || [[word:janazap|janazap]] || [[word:shanazap|shanazap]] || [[word:kanazap|kanazap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanazap|shanazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanazap|goshanazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanazap|gokishanazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanazapnĂŒ|shanazapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanazapnknĂŒ|goshanazapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazapnĂŒ|gokishanazapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanazapshĂ«|shanazapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanazapnkshĂ«|goshanazapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanazapshĂ«|gokishanazapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazapro|shanazapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazapnkro|goshanazapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazapro|gokishanazapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazapmu|shanazapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazapnkmu|goshanazapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazapmu|gokishanazapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanazapsher|shanazapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanazapnksher|goshanazapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanazapsher|gokishanazapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanazapng|shanazapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanazapnkng|goshanazapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanazapng|gokishanazapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanazapya|shanazapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanazapnkya|goshanazapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanazapya|gokishanazapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanazapyam|shanazapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanazapnkyam|goshanazapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanazapyam|gokishanazapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazapnĂŒshĂ«|shanazapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanazapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanazapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazapnĂŒro|shanazapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazapnknĂŒro|goshanazapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazapnĂŒro|gokishanazapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazapnĂŒmu|shanazapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazapnknĂŒmu|goshanazapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazapnĂŒmu|gokishanazapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazapshĂ«nĂŒ|shanazapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanazapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanazapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazapshĂ«ro|shanazapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazapnkshĂ«ro|goshanazapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazapshĂ«ro|gokishanazapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazapshĂ«mu|shanazapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazapnkshĂ«mu|goshanazapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazapshĂ«mu|gokishanazapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazapronĂŒ|shanazapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazapnkronĂŒ|goshanazapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazapronĂŒ|gokishanazapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazaproshĂ«|shanazaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazapnkroshĂ«|goshanazapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazaproshĂ«|gokishanazaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazapromu|shanazapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazapnkromu|goshanazapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazapromu|gokishanazapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazapmunĂŒ|shanazapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazapnkmunĂŒ|goshanazapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazapmunĂŒ|gokishanazapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazapmushĂ«|shanazapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazapnkmushĂ«|goshanazapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazapmushĂ«|gokishanazapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazapmuro|shanazapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazapnkmuro|goshanazapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazapmuro|gokishanazapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
